programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The Block A and Block B finals of the Beyblade World Championships are underway. Max wins his match and finds himself partnered with a real bully of a blader named Rick.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution Team heads to a remote training camp to prepare for the upcoming tournament. When they first arrive, Hiro tells Tyson that Kai has quit the team.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution team fly to New York City for the Beyblade World Championships. The normally feisty Daichi proves to be afraid of flying, and once in the city, he becomes overwhelmed by the size and scope of things in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The teams have been selected and the finals are about to begin...Unfortunately Tyson finds himself facing all of his former friends...each part of a team that he will eventually have to 'blade against.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson blames his embarrassing loss to Ray on Daichi, telling the team he's better off competing alone. As Tyson runs away, the US Finals continue with Rick of the PPB All Starz against Claude of Barthez Battalion.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The Beyblade World Tag Team Championships are about to start in Rome as Barthez busily prepares his team for the big event. He's even invited a television news crew to document his efforts as a coach.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson gets in a huff and leaves the team after he is dropped from the lineup against the Blitzkrieg Boys. This leaves Kenny and Daichi to pick up the slack against their opponents.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: In the second of a best of three match, Tala thinks he's broken Kenny down, but Kenny summons his inner strength and attacks with all of his combined power. Unfortunately, it's not enough, and Tala shatters Kenny's Hopper into pieces with his Novae Rog attack.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: In Madrid for the Spanish leg of the World Championships, the hard-of-sleeping Lee has a nightmare that Ray kicks him off the team for his poor play. The day before their next match, White Tiger X encounters a pair of beyblading jugglers in Madrid's main square, who also happen to be trick bladers.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: As Max prepares to face Kai in the next round, the members of BBA Revolution overhear a confrontation between Johnny and Robert of the Majestics and Barthez Battalion.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution are slated to face the sneaky Barthez Battalion, but while Hilary and Kenny want to report their dirty deeds to the authorities, Tyson believes the best way to teach them a lesson is to beat them fair and square...But that's before he really sees how low the team will sink to win.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Our heroes land in Egypt for the next leg of the tournament where the first two teams going up against each other are the Blitzkrieg Boys against the Barthez Battalion. But as Barthez readies his team, we learn he's devised a special spider web-like tape that is supposed to shoot out of his team's blades and trap their opponents in an inescapable web.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Max is having trouble convincing Rick that he is truly dedicated to the PPB All Starz. Max just wants to play for love of the game but Rick thinks he should do anything to win. When the competition continues Max demands they fight a "pairs" match so that he and Rick are forced to work as a team.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson has just returned back from the World Championships with another victory and he's decided to teach a class of boys in the neighborhood the fine art of blading.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson has his hands full when he's confronted by a tough little Blader named Daichi. Just as they're about to battle another mysterious Blader named Jin shows up and wants to challenge Tyson as well. All three Bladers mix it up but Ray puts a stop to the fight when he realizes that Tyson can't handle two Bladers at once.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Daichi continues to annoy Tyson with his constant battle challenges, which Tyson refuses to give in to - even after an embarrassing confrontation at the public swimming pool proves that Daichi is an impressive and highly skilled Beyblader.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson's alone and picking up the pieces of what used to be The Bladebreakers... Daichi won't leave him alone, and Kai is...well, Kai...at least he's got the championships to look forward too, right? Meanwhile, both Ray and Max are going through the growing pains of being part of a new team.

programme.title: Ainbo: Spirit of the Amazon
programme.desc: Moana meets Brave with the hit new animation Ainbo: Spirit of the Amazon. The story of a young girl who was born and grew up in the deepest jungle of the Amazon.

programme.title: MVP II: Most Vertical Primate
programme.desc: After being booted from his hockey team, Jack hits the road and meets Ben, a skateboarder with big dreams. Turns out Jack also has some impressive skater skills and the two set out on an hilarious cross-country skate tour!

programme.title: Monkey Up
programme.desc: The all-new family comedy about a talking capuchin monkey seeking to gain fame and fortune as a movie star, but instead finds what's most important, a family.

programme.title: Mosley
programme.desc: To save his family, Mosley, must embark on an epic journey to find the legendary Uprights... but what he unexpectedly finds will unlock a secret revealing his true nature. With large and layered themes, Mosley tells a timeless adventurous tale of family, love and hope!

programme.title: Snow White & The Red Shoes
programme.desc: A magic curse turns seven boastful princes into dwarfs until they can find a princess who would restore their appearance with a kiss. At the same time, nearby Snow White finds a pair of magic shoes that can transform her appearance at will. Based on the fairytale by the Brothers Grimm.

programme.title: Fun With Dick and Jane
programme.desc: After financial ruin, a married couple turn to crime to pay the bills.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) are salesmen whose careers have been torpedoed by the digital world. Trying to prove they are not obsolete, they defy the odds by talking their way into a coveted internship at Google, along with a battalion of brilliant college students.

programme.title: Hot Pursuit
programme.desc: An uptight and by-the-book cop (Reese Witherspoon) tries to protect the sexy and outgoing widow (Sofia Vergara) of a drug boss as they race through Texas pursued by crooked cops and murderous gunmen.

programme.title: Learning to Drive
programme.desc: Wendy is a book editor facing a marriage crisis. Darwan is a driving instructor from India with an abiding respect for tradition. When Wendy sets out to reclaim her independence, she hits a unique roadblock - she never learned to drive.

programme.title: Safety Not Guaranteed
programme.desc: An intern at a Seattle magazine jumps at the chance to investigate the author of a classified ad seeking someone to travel back in time with.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Riveting Sci-Fi action-thriller Push is set in a deadly world of psychic espionage where the ability to move objects using only the mind, see the future, create new realities and kill without ever touching the victim can turn a person into a lethal weapon - or a target. A young man (Chris Evans - Sunshine, Fantastic Four ) and a teenage girl with extraordinary gifts (Dakota Fanning - War of the Worlds) take on a clandestine agency in a battle they can win only if they change the future.

programme.title: Acts of Vengeance
programme.desc: A fast-talking lawyer transforms his body and takes a vow of silence, not to be broken until he finds out who killed his wife and daughter and has his revenge.

programme.title: Bare Knuckle
programme.desc: EXPERIENCE THE ULTIMATE BRITISH COMBAT SPORT, THROUGH THE EYES OF THE BARE KNUCKLE BOXING WORLD ELITE. Despite being centuries old, the sport of bare knuckle fighting is one that's always sat firmly in the shadow of its gloved alternative. Previously shunned to the darkest nooks of the UK, these boxers, rather than for financial reward are there purely for the fight itself, united by a fierce subculture of honour, pride and violence. Although remaining far removed from the glamour of pro-boxing, the underworld fighting scene has recently enjoyed a huge surge of mainstream attention, with many pro-boxers from around the world supporting the renaissance. Attracting huge crowds and selling out national arena bookings, this divisive sport has experienced a meteoric shift in favour, moving from the underground to a prime-time TV sport.Packed with frank, insightful and passionate interviews from an impressive range of fighters, promoters and authors, including Frank Bruno, BK fighter Jimmy Sweeney, and WBC & IBO Champion, Robin Reid, Bare Knuckle explores the legal issues and evolution of the sport, its continual rise in popularity, and the fight to give modern day bare knuckle boxers the professional recognition they deserve.

programme.title: I Know Who Killed Me
programme.desc: An idyllic small town is rocked when Aubrey Fleming (Lindsay Lohan), a bright and promising young college student is abducted and tortured by a sadistic serial killer. When she manages to escape, the traumatised girl who regains consciousness in the hospital insists that her identity is that of Dakota Moss a stripper in a seedy club and that the real Aubrey Fleming is still in mortal danger. A taut and gripping erotic thriller with a captivating riddle at its centre, I Know Who Killed Me explores the dark side of identity, sexuality and obsession.

programme.title: Ape vs Monster
programme.desc: A giant alien Gorilla goes one on one against a mega lizard from Earth. Starring Eric Roberts and Arianna Scott (2021).

programme.title: Jet Stream
programme.desc: A TV weatherman tries to find a way to stop devastating winds from ravaging the Earth. Starring David Chokachi, Ruth Kearney and Steven Hartley (2013).

programme.title: Kill Command
programme.desc: A team of marines attempt to survive after a training mission against warfare A.I. goes wrong. Starring Thure Lindhardt and Vanessa Kirby (2016)

programme.title: Settlers
programme.desc: The first humans on Mars do what they must to survive the cosmic elements and each other. Starring Jonny Lee Miller (2021)

programme.title: Firequake
programme.desc: A scientist creates a new unstable energy source that accidently starts devastating earthquakes around the globe. Starring Alexandra Pool, Zoe Barker and Nigel Barber (2014).

programme.title: You Don't Mess with the Zohan
programme.desc: A Mossad agent fakes his death so he can re-emerge in New York City as a hair stylist.

programme.title: Red Dawn
programme.desc: The citizens of Spokane, a small town in Washington state, awaken to the sight of North Korean paratroopers dropping from the sky. The U.S.A. has been invaded and their hometown is the initial target. Without warning, the town is unable to fight back and finds itself under enemy occupation.

programme.title: Barbershop: A Fresh Cut
programme.desc: It's been more than 10 years since our last appointment at Calvin's Barbershop. Calvin and his longtime crew are still there, but the shop has undergone some major changes. Most noticeably, our once male-dominated sanctuary is now co-ed.

programme.title: Hansel & Gretel: Witch Hunters
programme.desc: Catching up with Hansel and Gretel 15 years after their incident involving a gingerbread house, the siblings have evolved into bounty hunters who hunt witches.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: An ex-con sets out to avenge his brother's death after they were double-crossed during a heist years ago. During his campaign, however, he's tracked by a veteran cop and an egocentric hit man.

programme.title: The Bike Thief
programme.desc: A gritty British drama-thriller starring Alec Secareanu (God's Own Country) and Anamaria Marinca (4 Months, 3 Weeks And 2 Days). The Rider is an ordinary, hard-working man who is a delivery driver for a local restaurant, which is owned and run by his landlord. When the Rider's moped is stolen, his world turns upside down and a race against time starts to recover the source of his livelihood.

programme.title: The Door
programme.desc: An author forms a strange bond with her eccentric maid that will have a lasting effect on both women.

programme.title: Operation Valkyrie
programme.desc: High commanding officers conspire a plot to assassinate Adolf Hitler in July 1944. Based on a true story.

programme.title: Life or Something Like It
programme.desc: The perfect world of a beautiful Seattle television reporter is shattered by the prediction of her death in seven days.

programme.title: The Big Short
programme.desc: Based on the true story of four outsiders who saw what the big banks, media, and government refused to: the global collapse of the economy. A bold investment leads them into the dark underbelly of banking, where everyone and everything is in question.

programme.title: My Super Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: When he breaks up with his girlfriend, he discovers his ex is actually the reluctant superhero, G Girl. A scorned woman, she unleashes her super powers to humiliate and torment him.

programme.title: Command Performance
programme.desc: When the Russian Premier is taken hostage at a rock concert, it's up to a drummer and an ex-biker to save him.

programme.title: Direct Contact
programme.desc: An American prisoner in a Russian jail is given a chance at freedom if he can rescue a kidnapped woman.

programme.title: The Big Bang
programme.desc: A detective is hired to find a missing stripper. A simple job, but everyone he questions ends up dead.

programme.title: Command Performance
programme.desc: When the Russian Premier is taken hostage at a rock concert, it's up to a drummer and an ex-biker to save him.

programme.title: Rubikon
programme.desc: All they can do is watch as the world burns. The emergence of an extinction event on Earth leaves the inhabitants of a space station in horror, as they witness the end of humanity unfold before their very eyes. Does the crew risk their lives to get back home during the global catastrophe and search for survivors or remain safe and watch as life as they know it comes to an end?

programme.title: Siberia
programme.desc: John Wick meets John Le Carre as Keanu Reeves goes up against a Russian mob, in this chilly, action-packed thriller. American diamond trader, Lucas Hill travels to Russia to negotiate a deal involving some rare gems, with oligarch Boris Volkov. When things take a turn for the worse, Hill is stranded in the frozen wastes of Siberia, with only a local bar owner to help him face the deadly situation.

programme.title: The Wicker Man
programme.desc: Based on the hit thriller of the same name and starring Nicolas Cage, this cult classic returns 15 years after its original release. A man finds himself sucked into a twisted community whose secrets and Puritan ways could see a young girl sacrificed. It's a race against time for this outsider to save a life but the residents of Summers Isle may just have other plans.

programme.title: Eden Lodge
programme.desc: A bloodcurdling horror about a married couple that retreat to the idyllic English countryside to fix their marriage. Events rapidly take a turn for the worse when their car breaks down and they are forced to spend the night at a remote B&B. The place looks like a paradise, until they realise that the people they meet are being killed off one by one. A spine-tingling living nightmare.

programme.title: An Hour Behind
programme.desc: Bakery store owner Trish reluctantly agrees to go on a blind date. (2017)

programme.title: Accidentally In Love
programme.desc: Edie finds true love in London just days before she is to return to the US. They are separated, but as fate would have it, they reunite 6 years later in the US.

programme.title: Team Bride
programme.desc: Hannah McKenzie runs a side business on wedding dress when she's not busy with her job at salon. When Will Millington, heir to the bridal empire comes in looking to revamp the brand.

programme.title: Like Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: Laura and Spencer are strangers who are forced to share a beachside holiday home after a mix-up with their reservations. Will they ultimately prove that opposites really do attract? (2017)

programme.title: Secret Millionaire
programme.desc: Sean Peyton, the heir to Peyton Enterprises, would like to meet a girl who wants him for who he is - and not just for his last name.

programme.title: Lez Bomb
programme.desc: Lez Bomb is a hilarious and sweet “coming out” comedy in the vein of Meet the Parents from Bobby Farrelly, producer of There's Something about Mary. Lauren, (Writer-Director Jenna Laurenzo) comes home with life changing news. As it turns out, there is no good time to drop the Lez Bomb.

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Sexy Manhattanite Ashley is known as the luckiest woman around, but after a chance romantic encounter with down-and-out Jake, she realizes that she's swapped her fortune for his.

programme.title: Hint of Love
programme.desc: A cookbook literary agent with culinary training is tasked with helping elevate the brand of a food channel personality known for his convenience-oriented recipes. However, as the agent works with her client on a new cookbook, she must choose between following the directions or her heart.

programme.title: Anything Else
programme.desc: Jerry Falk (Jason Biggs), a young writer in New York City, leaves his girlfriend for free-spirited Amanda (Christina Ricci). Seeking advice, Jerry turns to an older, struggling artist who helps him deal with his messy love life.

programme.title: All Summers End
programme.desc: After a summer prank goes awry, a teenage boy falls in love while grappling with his guilty conscience.

programme.title: Accidentally In Love
programme.desc: Edie finds true love in London just days before she is to return to the US. They are separated, but as fate would have it, they reunite 6 years later in the US.

programme.title: Law of Attraction
programme.desc: A young female attorney with ambition to make partner in her law firm, falls for an opposing attorney on a big important case. Will love prevail?

programme.title: Romance Retreat
programme.desc: After a break-up, journalist Dana Willingham finds herself alone and stuck at a couple's yoga retreat while the biggest story of her career breaks far away.

programme.title: Back To Love
programme.desc: A young widow returns home for the first time in three years to help prepare her sister's wedding. She is forced to confront her past, including the man she never expected to fall for.

programme.title: Love Switch
programme.desc: On their 13th wedding anniversary, James and Michelle wake up to discover they have somehow switched bodies. Unable to switch back, they are forced to understand what the other goes through daily.

programme.title: Identical Love
programme.desc: After being left at the altar, Dr. Charlotte Hudson needs to escape life at home. She signs up to volunteer at a health clinic in a tropical country. But her plans of escaping are thrown off when she comes across her former fiancé's twin brother, Seth (a dentist), who is also volunteering with the clinic. As they spend time together, Seth falls in love with Charlotte, but she struggles to let go of seeing her fiancé every time she looks at Seth. The island romance will help her break free from the past and love Seth for who he is.

programme.title: Love Finds You in Sugarcreek
programme.desc: A father and son fleeing a shocking and brutal tragedy settle in the predominantly Amish town of Sugarcreek, Ohio. They are taken in by three sisters who offer the father work as a handyman, but a local policewoman begins to become suspicious of his past.

programme.title: My One True Love
programme.desc: When 2 of the 3 things a fortune teller predicts come true, Ali wonders about the 3rd - finding true love with a man named John. Drawn to a fireman whose name isn't John, does she trust destiny or her heart?

programme.title: Someone is Trying to Ruin My Life
programme.desc: 45-year-old Mary Jo faced teen pregnancy and "sexting" issues as a teacher.

programme.title: Sleeping With Danger
programme.desc: Paul Carter, inspired by Ann Rule's crime tales, woos Grace Tanner.

programme.title: Swim Instructor Nightmare
programme.desc: Parker hires a swim instructor for his daughter, who forms an obsession for him.

programme.title: Someone is Trying to Ruin My Life
programme.desc: 45-year-old Mary Jo faced teen pregnancy and "sexting" issues as a teacher.

programme.title: In The Moon's Shadow
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters amid tragedy unlock the truth to family secrets on a self-reflecting journey to see the Great American Eclipse.

programme.title: Obsession
programme.desc: Sonia has to move from the Big Apple to Boston leaving her friends, family and her ex Tom. She meets Sebastian and one thing leads to another, and a flirtatious smile between them soon turns into a dinner date. However, the more they get to know each other, the more suspicious Sonia becomes. His curiosity about her life soon turns to an obsession. Sonia starts to feel trapped in her relationship. When Tom comes to Seattle, he makes a side trip to visit Sonia and she realizes how much she missed him. After Tom goes back to New York, someone breaks into Sonia's home. But when she escapes to a friend's isolated country home for a long weekend she is trapped!! ..Except... Sebastian wasn't the one stalking her!! It was Tom, trying to scare Sonia into returning back home. Can Sebastian save her in time?

programme.title: Pure Country 2: The Gift
programme.desc: Three angels bestow the gift of song to a young girl, who must follow a series of rules in order hold on to it during her rise to fame and fortune.

programme.title: Stolen Dreams
programme.desc: Laura Paddington is overcome with joy when her daughter, Zoe, returns to her after being abducted 17 years before--but is Zoe really her long lost child?

programme.title: The House Bunny
programme.desc: The story of a Playboy Bunny who teaches an awkward sorority about the opposite sex - only to learn that what boys really like is what's on the inside.

programme.title: Rough Night
programme.desc: Five best friends from college (Scarlett Johansson, Kate McKinnon, Jillian Bell, Ilana Glazer and Zoë Kravitz) reunite 10 years later for a wild weekend getaway in Miami. Their outrageous antics and hard partying result in hilarious unexpected consequences which land them in a seemingly impossible situation to escape.

programme.title: Sex Tape
programme.desc: Jason Segel and Cameron Diaz star in this fun and racy comedy about a married couple on a wildly hysterical mission to recover their missing sex tape.

programme.title: The Big Hit
programme.desc: The criminal anarchy is hilarious when a foursome of full-time hit men looking to score extra cash kidnaps the boss' goddaughter. And when beleaguered wise guy Mel is set up to take the fall, underworld antics and domestic absurdities collide for a working weekend no one will soon forget. Mark Wahlberg, Lou Diamond Phillips, Christina Applegate, Bokeem Woodbine and Antonio Sabato, Jr. star in this explosive action comedy.

programme.title: Saving Silverman
programme.desc: Two friends try anything to keep their buddy and bandmate from marrying the wrong woman.

programme.title: The Legend of the Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The sole surviving Texas Ranger (Klinton Spilsbury) of an ambush arranged by outlaw leader Major Bartholomew "Butch" Cavendish (Christopher Lloyd) returns to fight back as a great masked western hero, The Lone Ranger.

programme.title: The Over-the-Hill Gang Rides Again
programme.desc: Retired Texas Ranger Nash Crawford re-assembles his former Ranger outfit from the old days to fight crime in his hometown.

programme.title: Yellow Hair and the Fortress of Gold
programme.desc: Fiery blonde half-breed Yellow Hair and her easygoing sidekick the Pecos Kid are after a fortune in Mayan gold.

programme.title: Joshua The Black Rider
programme.desc: A black soldier returns from fighting for the Union in the Civil War only to find out that his mother has been murdered by a gang of white thugs.

programme.title: The Embezzler
programme.desc: When an elderly bank clerk with only two years to live absconds with the contents of a bank safe, his plan to escape to a hot and exciting South American country to live out his final years in a blaze of fun and wealth becomes ever more precarious.

programme.title: Constant Husband
programme.desc: An Englishman wakes in a hotel bedroom suffering from amnesia and sets out to find his identity. He tracks down his wife but soon learns that the job she saw him leave for every morning did not exist. He learns to his disgust that that is the least of his lies. He is a cad and bigamist (or, worse, he has seven wives and identities). His female lawyer tries to keep him out of jail, though he prefers incarceration to multiple matrimony.

programme.title: Feminine Touch
programme.desc: Five young women arrive at St. Augustine's Hospital to take up a nursing career. They are told by the matron of the hardships and possible satisfactions that lie ahead of them. All succeed in passing their preliminary examination, and one of them falls in love with a young house doctor, Jim Alcott. She decides to give up her career to marry him, but later the experience of helping to save a patient's life and of giving fresh hope to a woman who has attempted suicide makes her change her mind and put duty first. However, the example of one of her friends who gets married and the advice of the matron persuades Susan to share Jim's career in the wilds of Canada.

programme.title: Folly to Be Wise
programme.desc: When Captain Paris takes over at a big army camp as Chaplain and Entertainments Officer, the troops are in for some surprises. Captain Paris finds the Garrison Theatre ill attended, as the troops favor the local hostelries in preference to the succession of feminine string quartets and madrigal singers hitherto engaged for their amusement. Paris sets out to remedy this sad state of affairs, but his idea of staging a Brains Trust with local celebrities as the 'brains' turns out to have disastrous results!

programme.title: Father's Doing Fine
programme.desc: A domestic comedy based on the play "Little Lambs Eat Ivy", dealing with the adventures of an impoverished upper-class family consisting of a widowed mother and her four daughters. The love affairs of the two unmarried daughters, some worthless shares, a thieving butler, the unpaid rent, the matrimonial difficulties of a third daughter and the approaching "accouchement" of the eldest provide the film's story.

programme.title: The Final Cut
programme.desc: In the future, a man with access to people's memories finds his life at risk when he discovers a dark secret.

programme.title: Meet Dave
programme.desc: Seeking a way to save their doomed world, a crew of tiny, human-looking aliens arrives on Earth in the perfect disguise--a spaceship shaped like an ordinary man.

programme.title: Exceptional Beings
programme.desc: Two supernatural beings question their divine status when they meet an ordinary woman with a disturbing essence: a human being who does not correspond to what their millennia of knowledge of humanity has taught them.

programme.title: Infini
programme.desc: Humanity has become the victim of mass overpopulation and the line between middle class and poverty no longer exists. Whit Carmichael has accepted a high-risk security job that requires off-world travel using Slipstream.

programme.title: Trancers
programme.desc: A gruff bounty hunter travels back in time to 1980s Los Angeles to stop a twisted criminal who can transform people into zombie-like creatures.

programme.title: Murder 101: If Wishes Were Horses
programme.desc: A criminology professor and a private detective work together to try and solve the disappearance of a champion thoroughbred. Stars Dick Van Dyke, Barry Van Dyke (2007)

programme.title: Martha's Vineyard Mysteries: Ships In The Night
programme.desc: After an art gallery robbery leads to the death of the gallery manager, detective Jeff Jackson teams up with local doctor, his old flame, to catch the killer. Starring Jesse Metcalfe (2020)

programme.title: Dragon Eyes
programme.desc: (2012) Gritty action starring Cung Le and Jean-Claude Van Damme. Can a mysterious newcomer use his moral vision and fighting skills to save a neighbourhood terrorised by gangs and corrupt cops?

programme.title: PERSONAL SHOPPER
programme.desc: An intense psychological thriller about a personal shopper who lives in Paris refuses to move out of the city until she finds a way of communicating with her dead brother who died there. Starring Kristen Stewart (2016).

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: The Water Margin: Kao Chiu Loses His Heart
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.title: Geronimo: An American Legend
programme.desc: A legendary warrior leads the last remaining free Indian tribe against U.S. Army forces intent on their subjugation.

programme.title: Berry Gordy's The Last Dragon
programme.desc: An enjoyable pastiche of martial arts, romance, music, and video, THE LAST DRAGON presents a likable young hero, Leroy (Taimak), who aspires to become a kung fu master. Trouble arises in the form of a huge man who calls himself "Sho' Nuff, who is determined to prove himself the kung fu master of the neighborhood.

programme.title: Drunken Master
programme.desc: A young man is unwittingly caught up in a fight between a group trying to steal ancient Chinese artifacts and a group trying to preserve them. He has a unique style of fighting called "Drunken Boxing" which makes him a formidable opponent.

programme.title: Casualties Of War
programme.desc: From visionary director Brian De Palma, war is war, but murder is murder. Michael J. Fox and Sean Penn star in this action-packed Vietnam war saga in which one soldier thought he had a license to kill and another dared to stand in his way.

programme.title: Risen
programme.desc: RISEN is the epic Biblical story of the Resurrection, as told through the eyes of a non-believer. Clavius, a powerful Roman military tribune, and his aide, Lucius, are tasked with solving the mystery of what happened to Jesus in the weeks following the crucifixion.

programme.title: Pressure Point
programme.desc: Friday Night Lights meets The Social Network. Starring Oscar nominee Michael Shannon and featuring Alexander Ludwig (Vikings) and Charles Melton (Riverdale) is inspirational sports drama, Pressure Point...

programme.title: Blue Ruin
programme.desc: This critically acclaimed indie gem follows Dwight, a mysterious drifter whose quiet life is turned upside down when he learns that the man who murdered his parents is being released from prison.

programme.title: Bad Country
programme.desc: Bad Country concerns a veteran Baton Rouge detective who infiltrates the most powerful criminal enterprise in the South and, after taking down its top lieutenant and contract killer, convinces him to turn informant to help bring down the entire organization including its amoral leader.

programme.title: Out of Time
programme.desc: Denzel Washington stars in this spell-binding thriller that co-stars Eva Mendes, Sanaa Lathan and Dean Cain. In a small Florida town bordered by azure seas and sultry secrets, Chief of Police Matt Whitlock (Washington) finds himself caught in the eye of a storm.

programme.title: Mortdecai
programme.desc: The British Mi5, his impossibly wife and an international terrorist, debonair art Charlie Mortdecai must traverse the globe armed only with his good looks in a race to recover a stolen painting rumored to contain the code to bank account.

programme.title: 16 Blocks
programme.desc: They chose the worst man for the job. They expected him to fail, but he wasn't about to let a witness be murdered on his watch. Personal demons put Jack a New York City cop at rock bottom.

programme.title: Sniper: Reloaded
programme.desc: While working with the UN Forces in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, Marine Sgt. Brandon Beckett (Chad Michael Collins), son of renowned sniper Thomas Beckett, receives orders to rescue a European farmer trapped in the middle of hostile rebel territory.

programme.title: S3 E26 Belper to Lincolnshire
programme.desc: Dave and Barbara decided to marry on the night they met. Now three years on, the couple want to buy their first home together. Catherine Gee scours the Lincolnshire Fens with £225k for the house that will mark a new start for them and Barbara's son.

programme.title: S3 E28 Poole to Somerset
programme.desc: Comedian Scott is looking for a new country home close to his favorite cricket club, Somerset. But with girlfriend Lisa likely to make the move too, should he spend £250k and live mortgage-free or spend up to half a million pounds on a dream home?

programme.title: S3 E30 York to Yorkshire
programme.desc: Jennie is selling her bed and breakfast following her husband's death. She wants a Yorkshire country home where she can throw parties and teach Malaysian cooking. Catherine Gee must also find a double garage for Jennie's son, who's moving with her.

programme.title: S3 E32 North London to the Chilterns
programme.desc: The arrival of baby Archie means Emma and Scott want to swap their flat in North London for a family home in The Chilterns. Catherine Gee has £425,000 to find the home where Archie will grow up complete with a garden for fun and games.

programme.title: S3 E34 Enfield to Devon
programme.desc: The Miller family have an unusual request for their new home in the country: they need a building big enough to build their own bowling alley. Luckily Mom and Dad have a budget of just over a million-pound budget for their new home in North Devon.

programme.title: S3 E36 Cardiff to Herefordshire
programme.desc: Arun is a bit of a property expert, and he and his wife Rita want to move to Herefordshire where Arun plans to raise pet pigs! So he needs outbuildings and land as well as a house which is full of character.
